item.title: 这个老头乐自动暖脚宝现在成了我的最佳 vibe 伴侣。 https://t.co/Z7kefmkmG7

item.title: 我现在把 native app 的开发全部交给 codex app 来做了，从开发到测试完全自动化，慢点就慢点，native app 我是一点 vibe 不了，完全不想盯着看。
item.author: @turingou

item.title: Introducing: Browser Harness. A self-healing harness that can complete virtually any browser task. ♞...
item.description:
Introducing: Browser Harness. A self-healing harness that can complete virtually any browser task. ♞
We got tired of browser frameworks restricting the LLM. So we removed the framework.
> Self-healing — edits helpers. py on the fly > Direct CDP — one websocket to Chrome > No framework, no rails, complete freedom > Drop-in for Claude Code and Codex
I challenge anyone to find a task that DOESN'T work. I couldn't yet.🔥
100% open source ↓
--- @gregpr07 | ❤️ 18 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 567
item.author: @gregpr07
